title: FancyPerks
description: A simple plugin that adds some fancy perks to your server.
body:
# Fancy Perks **-------------------------------------------** **This plugin is no longer being supported, developed and maintained. There will be only updates for real high critical security issues. Do not expect any new feature or bug fixed.** **-------------------------------------------** A simple plugin that adds some fancy perks to your server. **Only supported for 1.19.4** _(might work in other version too tho)_
_Using [paper](https://papermc.io/downloads) is highly recommended_ ## Commands /perks - Opens the perks gui
/perks activate (perk | *) - _Activates the perk_
/perks deactivate (perk | *) - _Deactivates the perk_
/fancyperks version - _Shows the current version_
/fancyperks reload - _Reloads the config_
## Permissions To use a perk - ``fancyperks.perk.(perk name)``
## Perks - Fast Digging - Night Vision - Water Breathing - Keep Exp - Fly - No Hunger - Keep Inventory - No Fire Damage - No Fall Damage - Double exp - Strength - Double mob drops - God (no damage) - Vanish - Mobs ignore - Glowing - Telekinesis - Instant Smelt
